title: Security: heap-buffer-overflow on components/exo/shell_surface_util.cc:230:40 (Lacros)
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
Similar with issue #1330125.  
  
**VERSION**

Operating System: linux-chromeOS  
  
**REPRODUCTION CASE**

(2) Detach one tab
